block_00: New ESMA regulation. What to know?
block_01: As you probably already know new stricter regulation, recently introduced by the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), has come into effect from August 1, 2018.
block_02: The regulation will mostly affect your ability to trade on margin. As a result, retail clients will no longer have access to higher leverages.
block_03: From now on the maximum available leverage will depend on the client status and the underlying asset you trade. Additionally, all clients will now be provided with margin closeouts at 50%.
block_13: More about the differences between retail and professional clients
